intro_text: But inside, things feel heavy. You’re tired of carrying it alone and wondering why it still feels this hard. We provide specialized therapy for individuals and couples who are navigating the heavy, everyday impact of past experiences.
intro_title: You look like you're holding everything together.
feature_title: Healing the roots, not just the symptoms.
hero_title: You've Been Holding It Together for Everyone Else. What About *You?*
feature_text: Our approach bridges the gap between logic and emotion. We integrate EMDR and IFS-informed parts work to help your brain and body finally sync up. This is bottom-up healing that addresses the survival brain where trauma impacts reign.
hero_subtitle: EMDR and Trauma-Informed Therapy in Leesburg, VA for adults and couples ready to stop surviving and start living.
